title: artagon-openai-server config
description: Schema for `.agents/artagon/config.yaml` — project-level configuration for the OpenAI Chat Completions facade daemon (bin/artagon-openai-server). Every field corresponds to an existing CLI flag; the config file is loaded once at boot and merged with CLI flags (CLI wins). Editors / VS Code with the YAML extension will validate edits against this schema when the YAML carries `# yaml-language-server: $schema=./config.schema.json`.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference. When present, IDE / yaml-language-server validates this file against the named schema.

host.description: Bind address. Default 127.0.0.1 (loopback only). Setting to 0.0.0.0 exposes the daemon to the network — operator MUST also set `auth` when doing so, otherwise the unauthed `/admin/status` endpoint becomes readable from peers.

port.description: Listen port. 0 = OS-assigned (the chosen port is written to the facade-endpoint.json manifest so slash-commands can discover it).

cors.description: CORS allowlist. Off by default. Specify `true` or `"*"` to allow any origin (only safe for development); a single origin string for one allowlist entry; or an array of origins for multi-origin. Maps to the --cors CLI flag.

auth.description: API-key authentication for `/v1/*` and `/admin/status`. Off by default — safe only with the default loopback bind. `/health` is always auth-exempt (LB probe).

source.description: How the bearer key reaches the daemon. `none` disables auth. `explicit` is the literal key in `value` (less secure: visible in `ps`). `file` reads `path` (0o600 expected). `keychain` provisions/reads a CSPRNG key from macOS Keychain (or `$XDG_STATE_HOME/.../api-key` 0o600 file on non-darwin).

value.description: Literal key. Required when `source: explicit`. Single key OR comma-separated allowlist for multi-key rotation.

path.description: Filesystem path to a file containing the key(s). Required when `source: file`. File should be 0o600. One key per line OR comma-separated.

rotate.description: Only meaningful for `source: keychain`. When true, force generation of a fresh CSPRNG key, overwriting any existing entry. Default false (idempotent re-read).

store.description: Only meaningful for `source: keychain`. Override the auto-key backend. Default is keychain on macOS, file elsewhere.

diagnostics.description: Verbose-mode + strict-env + wire-log diagnostics propagated to the runner path via serverContext.

debug.description: Enable verbose diagnostics on the runner path (sets context.debug=true).

strictEnv.description: Fail at boot on unknown ARTAGON_*/ACP_WIRE_LOG* env keys (typo guard). Useful for CI / production deployments where surprise env-var typos shouldn't silently fall through.

wireLog.description: Capture every JSON-RPC frame from every backend request into <path> (NDJSON). Wire-log is bound at supervisor construction; changing the path on a running daemon requires shutdownAllStreamingRunners() to rebind.

breaker.description: Circuit-breaker tuning for the slash-command auto-start path. ALL three fields here are reflected in `lib/server/auto-start.mjs` constants AND in operator-facing docs; changing them requires updating the constants + doc claims in lockstep, or the round-18 drift guards will fail CI.

threshold.description: Number of recent failures within `windowMs` that trips the breaker. Default 3.

windowMs.description: Rolling window for the breaker, in milliseconds. Default 300000 (5 minutes). Failures outside this window are pruned on read.

tombstoneMaxAgeMs.description: Tombstones from compareAndDeleteManifest older than this are swept on each autoStartFacade entry. Default 3600000 (1 hour). Don't set lower than ~1 minute or you risk racing concurrent compareAndDeleteManifest calls.
